prompt: Generate a complete architecture document skeleton for the task management SaaS platform. The output must follow the standard architecture document template format.

assertions.name: is_valid_markdown
assertions.description: Output must be valid markdown with H1/H2 headings

assertions.name: has_document_title
assertions.description: Document must have a clear H1 title related to the system

assertions.name: sections_in_logical_order
assertions.description: Overview section should appear before Modules section

assertions.name: uses_consistent_heading_levels
assertions.description: Main sections should be H2, sub-sections should be H3

assertions.name: includes_metadata_header
assertions.description: Document should include version/date metadata at the top
